_publications._publicationTitle: Modelling neurofibromatosis type 1 tibial dysplasia and its treatment with lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: We thus quantified TRAP-positive bone lining cells within the injury site and determined the rate of bone turnover by measuring D-PYD concentrations in serum
details: Successfully measured serum D-PYD concentrations to assess bone turnover, detecting increased levels in Nf1Prx1 mice (3.95 ± 0.71 nMol/l) versus controls (2.5 ± 0.39 nMol/l)
